title: WRQVM (Wide-Range Quantum Vacuum Modulator)
content:
WRQVM is a device to modulate the quantum vacuum (aether) for propulsion/energy.

Key specs:
- Vacuum impedance: 376.730... ohms (Z_0)
- Target modulation: 1-100 MHz (RF range)
- Expected thrust: 100-1000 µN (photon momentum coupling)

Design: Vacuum chamber, RF antenna array, Casimir cavity, field gradiant generator.

Status: Deep dive spec written (537 lines). Ready for vacuum chamber test.
